content.speakerText: The warranty doesn't cover damage from unauthorized repairs.
content.speakerTextCn: 保修不涵盖因非授权维修造成的损坏。
expectedAnswers: So if I take it to a local shop, I'll lose coverage?
What counts as unauthorized? Any repair not done by you?
Can you recommend an authorized service center nearby?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：准确理解并追问'非授权维修'的定义或后果
语言准确性：使用正确疑问句和专业术语（authorized/unauthorized）
表达自然度：语调自然，符合消费者确认信息的口语习惯
